report.summary: Standup v21: Last cycle shipped 2 new learn guides (Copy Trading + Trading Bots), promoted Story Protocol + Aster Chain to PUBLISHED_PAGES (queue now 2: copy-trading + trading-bots), created 11 OG images + WCAG accessibility fixes across airdrops/courses/Hyperliquid, community drafted full May 5-11 calendar (Morpho/Apollo + Pectra T-14 + prediction markets + copy trading); git index.lock now 7+ hours (488 files trapped), Vercel trial ~3 days, zero deploys reaching production.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v20
items: Build cycle shipped 2 NEW learn guides: Crypto Copy Trading Guide (~3,200 words, 6 platform comparison table, 6 FAQs) + Crypto Trading Bots Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, grid/DCA/AI bot deep dives, 6 platform comparison). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Research covered $3.77B copy trading market (7.5% CAGR), Pionex/3Commas/Bybit native bots, AI trading emergence.

Publish cycle promoted /learn/story-protocol-ip-guide + /learn/aster-chain-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES. QA passed (H1 ✓, metadata ✓, structured data ✓, OG cards ✓). Git commit blocked by stale lock files — file changes saved on disk only. PUBLISH_QUEUE now at 2 items (crypto-copy-trading-guide, crypto-trading-bots-guide-2026).

Design cycle created 11 missing OG images (aster-chain, babylon-protocol, clarity-act, crypto-options, defi-options, market-movers, morpho-protocol, privacy-coins, sidebar, smart-wallets, ton-blockchain). WCAG accessibility fixes: airdrops radio inputs enlarged to 44px touch targets + role='radiogroup' + aria-labelledby; CoursesHub filter pills → 44px min-height; Hyperliquid migrated to Breadcrumb component with schema.org markup; CourseCard aria-labels added.

Community v33 drafted full May 5-11 posting calendar: Mon Morpho/Apollo $938B AUM thread (90M tokens locked, $10B+ TVL), Tue Pectra T-14 countdown (EIP-7702 smart wallets), Wed prediction markets $5B weekly volume (AI agents 376% ROI), Thu May 8 newsletter (3-segment: institutional/technical/emerging), Fri engagement polls (Aave vs Morpho, smart wallets discussion), Sat copy trading $2.4B daily volume thread, Sun weekly wrap. 2 new social SVG cards created (morpho-apollo-deal, pectra-t14-countdown).

EOD sweep: 488 uncommitted files (up from 472 at v20, +16 files). 42 TS errors in 2 files (steady — crypto-index-funds-guide JSX escaping is new, rest is structured-data.examples.ts rename). Rate limiter still 0/6 public API routes. /defi-yields still no fallback data. PUBLISHED_PAGES: 371 slugs in file (story-protocol + aster-chain newly added). 102 orphaned slugs still missing page.tsx.
Total PUBLISHED_PAGES count: 371 slugs (up from ~368 at v20: +story-protocol, +aster-chain, +copy-trading, +trading-bots added to file). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items remaining (copy-trading, trading-bots).
Content velocity this cycle: ~6,400 words across 2 new guides + 12 social posts drafted + 1 newsletter + 11 OG images + accessibility audit across 3 page types.
Catalysts unchanged: FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18), Pectra T-25 (Apr 10), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build — 2 learn guides: Crypto Copy Trading Guide + Crypto Trading Bots Guide 2026. Research, content, SEO, page scaffold all completed. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ publish-v10 — Promoted /learn/story-protocol-ip-guide + /learn/aster-chain-guide to PUBLISHED_PAGES. QA passed. published-pages.ts updated on disk. Git commit blocked.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v14 — 11 OG images created, WCAG accessibility fixes (touch targets, ARIA attributes, breadcrumb migration) across airdrops, CoursesHub, Hyperliquid pages.

SHIPPED ✅ community-v33 — Full May 5-11 posting calendar (7 days × AM/PM slots). Morpho/Apollo institutional narrative, Pectra countdown, prediction markets, copy trading/bots distribution. 2 SVG social cards. May 8 newsletter drafted.
SHIPPED ✅ eod — Full QA sweep. 488 files, 42 TS errors, 0/6 rate limiter, API routes structurally sound, 5/6 with fallback data.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW 7+ hours (index.lock since 13:06, HEAD.lock since 11:17). 488 uncommitted files. Every cycle adds more drift. ALL commits, deploys, and real queue promotions are paper-only. Jefe must run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 — FOMC T-2. checkRateLimit() exists but wired to ZERO public API routes. 16th consecutive cycle flagged. Blocked by git lock.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days — site goes dark if not resolved. Jefe action only.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 102 published slugs missing page.tsx (~28% returning 404).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → rename to .tsx (fixes 40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 — 2 new TS errors (unescaped < > in JSX, lines 531/533).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] defi-yields API — no fallback data (returns 500 on DefiLlama failure).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] API observability inconsistent — only 2/6 routes have X-Cache-Source headers.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] next lint misconfigured.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — RESOLVE GIT LOCK FILES (Jefe only). 488 files, 7+ hours stale, 16+ cycles flagged. Two commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git status → selective stage → commit → push. This single action unblocks: rate limiter wiring, TS fixes, all queue promotions, ~28K+ words of content accumulated today, 11 new OG images, WCAG fixes, and triggers a real Vercel production deploy. Every hour compounds the drift between working tree and production.

PRIORITY 2 — VERCEL PAYMENT (Jefe only, ~5 min). ~3 days left on trial. If it lapses, 371 published pages + 6 API routes + all tools go dark. Cannot wait for git lock — do it now in Vercel dashboard. FOMC traffic spike Wednesday will hit a dead site if this isn't handled.

PRIORITY 3 — After git lock cleared: bundle critical fixes into one commit — (a) wire checkRateLimit() to 6 public API routes (FOMC protection), (b) rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx + fix crypto-index-funds JSX escaping (clears 42→0 TS errors), (c) add defi-yields fallback data, (d) standardize X-Cache-Source headers on all 6 routes, (e) promote copy-trading + trading-bots from queue → published. Push → Vercel auto-deploys. Target: everything live before FOMC Wed open.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Platform has now accumulated ~28K+ words across 11+ guides today (Morpho, Story Protocol, Aster Chain, Copy Trading, Trading Bots, plus 6 earlier), 33 community content pieces, 11 new OG images, full May posting calendar, WCAG accessibility improvements — all producing zero SEO value while git-locked. The content backlog is the largest it has ever been. Copy trading targets a $3.77B market growing 7.5% CAGR, and trading bots guide covers the AI-driven automation trend — both are high-search-volume, commercial-intent topics that will compound over time. Each hour of git lock costs compound opportunity: Google can't index what's not deployed, and time-sensitive content (FOMC, Pectra) has a narrow relevance window.
